summary: Update mode testing complete. Tested new Telemetry tab with sensor monitoring (MATEK 3901-L0X, TF-Luna) and Smart RTL status panel. All 21 backend tests passed, all 19 frontend tests passed. Updated core-flows.spec.ts to include new Telemetry tab and tab-telemetry navigation tests.

ui_bugs.issue: Components don't forward data-testid prop - they accept testId/data-testid as prop but don't spread it to the underlying DOM element

action_items: LOW PRIORITY: Fix data-testid forwarding in SensorCard, GlassPanel, and AnimatedCard components by spreading remaining props. Currently these components accept testId/data-testid as props but don't render them on the DOM element.
seed_data_creation: Test routes created dynamically with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All telemetry features tested and working. New Telemetry tab navigation, sensor cards (MATEK 3901-L0X, TF-Luna), Smart RTL panel with phase indicators all verified. Note: GlassPanel and AnimatedCard components don't forward data-testid props, so tests use text locators for those elements.

core-flows.spec.ts: App loads with header and navigation (v2.0 badge)
Navigation tabs visible including new Telemetry tab
Tab navigation switches between all 6 tabs
About section displays project info with sensors specs
NEW: Telemetry tab displays sensor monitoring dashboard
map-simulation.spec.ts: New route button loads new route
Map stats display keyframes and distance
Auto-save toggle is visible and functional
route-history.spec.ts: API: List routes endpoint returns array
API: Save and delete route via API
UI: Enable auto-save and save route
UI: Route History page displays saved routes

telemetry_tab.section: data-testid='telemetry-section' renders after API data loads

sensors.optical_flow: MATEK 3901-L0X card displays with flow_x, flow_y, quality metrics
sensors.lidar: TF-Luna LiDAR card displays with distance and signal metrics

smart_rtl.panel: Smart RTL panel with 'Гібридна навігація повернення' subtitle
smart_rtl.metrics: Висота, До дому, Прогрес, Джерело displayed
smart_rtl.phases: data-testid='smart-rtl-phases' shows HIGH ALT, DESCENT, LOW ALT, LANDING indicators

new_endpoints: GET /api/sensors/status - returns optical flow + LiDAR data
GET /api/smart-rtl/status - returns RTL status with phase
